subcodes.first_line: All things bear witness to the Manifestation of God and His sovereignty, yet the people comprehend not. The tongue hath testified unto its Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد کل شیء لظهور الله و سلطانه ولکن القوم لایفقهون قد شهد اللسان لربه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
